name: bifocals-gnome-extension
description: Gnome extension adding more window management keyboard shortcuts

scripts.compile-translations: for lang in $(cat po/LINGUAS); do mkdir -p locale/$lang/LC_MESSAGES && msgfmt po/$lang.po -o locale/$lang/LC_MESSAGES/bifocals@shiznatix.mo; done
scripts.copy-files: copyfiles schemas/** dist && copyfiles metadata.json dist && copyfiles LICENSE dist && copyfiles locale/**/* dist
scripts.zip: cd dist && zip -r bifocals.zip . && mv bifocals.zip ..
scripts.build: npm run clean && tsc && npm run compile-schemas && npm run compile-translations && npm run copy-files && npm run zip

author: shiznatix
